entities.name: DOKUR VILLAGE
entities.description: A village in Mahabubnagar district of Andhra Pradesh, India, used as a case study for socio-economic research

entities.name: MAHABUBNAGAR DISTRICT
entities.description: The district where Dokur village is located

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where Mahabubnagar district is located

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The climatic region where the studied villages are located

entities.name: VILLAGE LEVEL STUDIES (VLS)
entities.description: A long-term socio-economic research project by ICRISAT

entities.name: LONGITUDINAL HOUSEHOLD PANEL DATA
entities.description: Data collected from a fixed set of households over time to track changes

entities.name: FORMAL SURVEYS
entities.description: A systematic method of data collection from households

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP MEETINGS (FGM)
entities.description: A qualitative research method involving group discussions

entities.name: PERSONAL INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A qualitative research method involving one-on-one discussions with key informants

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: POVERTY LINE
entities.description: The minimum level of income deemed adequate in a particular country

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: A prolonged period of abnormally low rainfall, leading to water shortage

entities.name: VULNERABILITY
entities.description: The degree to which a household is susceptible to adverse effects of shocks

entities.name: COPING MECHANISMS
entities.description: Strategies used by households to manage and survive shocks like drought

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food or profit

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: The proportion of area under various crops at a particular time

entities.name: FOOD CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown primarily for human consumption

entities.name: CASH CROPS
entities.description: Crops grown for sale in the market rather than for use by the grower

entities.name: HIGH VALUE CROPS
entities.description: Crops that yield a high net return per unit of land

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: Money received, especially on a regular basis, for work or investments

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The ability of a business or activity to earn a profit

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science or practice of farming, including cultivation of the soil for the growing of crops

entities.name: MIGRATION
entities.description: Movement of people from one place to another, often for employment

entities.name: NON-FARM ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Economic activities that do not involve farming or agriculture

entities.name: LITERACY
entities.description: The ability to read and write

entities.name: EDUCATION
entities.description: The process of receiving or giving systematic instruction

entities.name: DIVERSIFICATION OF LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The process of expanding the range of activities from which a household derives income

entities.name: CREDIT FACILITIES
entities.description: The availability of loans or credit to individuals or businesses

entities.name: FORMAL CREDIT SOURCES
entities.description: Regulated financial institutions providing loans

entities.name: INFORMAL SOURCES
entities.description: Unregulated lenders, such as private moneylenders

entities.name: WOMEN EMPOWERMENT
entities.description: The process of increasing the social, political, and economic strength of women

entities.name: GOVERNMENT WELFARE PROGRAMS
entities.description: Social services provided by the government to improve the well-being of citizens

entities.name: VILLAGE DEVELOPMENT ACTIVITIES
entities.description: Initiatives aimed at improving the infrastructure and quality of life in a village

entities.name: SELF-HELP GROUPS (SHGS)
entities.description: Small voluntary associations of people who come together to improve their living conditions

entities.name: WELFARE
entities.description: The health, happiness, and fortunes of a person or group
